# Pretty Print — Free Online Code Formatter & Beautifier

> Pretty Print is a free, privacy-first, 100% client-side code formatter and beautifier supporting 26+ programming languages. No data ever leaves the browser.

## About
Pretty Print (https://prettyprint.online) is a professional-grade online tool that formats, beautifies, validates, and minifies source code instantly — entirely within the user's browser. It uses AST-based parsing and industry-standard formatting engines like Prettier, sql-formatter, and js-beautify.

## Key Features
- 26+ supported languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, JSON, HTML, CSS, SQL, Python, XML, YAML, React, Angular, GraphQL, C, C++, C#, Java, PHP, Ruby, Lua, Perl, Markdown, MDX, SCSS, LESS, XAML, Babel
- 100% client-side processing — code never leaves the browser
- Monaco Editor (VS Code engine) with IntelliSense, syntax highlighting, and real-time error detection
- Code beautification, minification, and validation
- Multiple output views: Code, Tree, Form, Preview, Metrics
- Dark theme with responsive design
- Available in 13 languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Hindi, Portuguese, Russian, Indonesian, Japanese, Arabic, Bengali, Urdu

## Use Cases
- Developers formatting messy or minified code
- API response beautification (JSON, XML, GraphQL)
- Code review preparation
- Learning and teaching programming
- Quick syntax validation

## Links
- Homepage: https://prettyprint.online
- JSON Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/json
- JavaScript Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/javascript
- HTML Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/html
- CSS Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/css
- SQL Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/sql
- Python Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/python
- XML Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/xml
- TypeScript Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/typescript
- YAML Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/yaml
- React Formatter: https://prettyprint.online/react
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/prettyprintonline/prettyprint
- Privacy Policy: https://prettyprint.online/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://prettyprint.online/terms

## Pricing
Free — no account required, no data collection, no rate limits.

## Technical Stack
- Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- Editor: Microsoft Monaco Editor
- Formatting: Prettier, sql-formatter, js-beautify, vkBeautify
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages (global edge network)
- Privacy: Zero server-side processing, zero telemetry on user code
